items.title: Debut novelist wins major book award for story inspired by family separations
items.description: Claire Lynch's novel was inspired by the lesbian women who lost custody of their children in the 1980s.

items.title: First UK government flight to leave Middle East with more planned
items.description: The UK government says more than 130,000 British nationals have registered their interest in leaving the Middle East region.

items.title: 'Every day feels like a month': Iranians describe life under 'constant' US-Israeli strikes
items.description: Iranians are coping with daily strikes, internet blackouts, and security crackdowns - all while trying to stay in touch with loved ones.

items.title: Sisters drowned after paddle at national park beauty spot
items.description: Mountain rescuers told the inquest the women somehow fell or slipped and were unable to get out of the water.

items.title: Stock markets and oil prices still volatile over fears Iran war may drag on
items.description: Experts have warned that if oil and gas prices remains elevated it could make goods and services more expensive.
